name: RPlog_Operation_Nova
title: Operation Nova
summary: Commander Calder briefs her assembled marines on Operation Nova, the opening phase of a system-wide counteroffensive to liberate Caspia from Imperial occupation through an airborne and seaborne assault on Imperial command and logistics in Plaxton City's Western Quarter. The sprawling battle that follows pits New Republic marines, rangers, and pilots -- among them Jairen, Webb, Rabid, Shen (Shenner), Devyn, Dyrna, and others -- against entrenched Imperial stormtroopers and units across the contested city. Through fierce, phase-by-phase fighting the marines break the back of the Imperial grip on the quarter. In the war-torn aftermath, amid makeshift armor and rubble, a child's small wish for her seeds signals that the long period of rebuilding for liberated Caspia has finally begun.
